body:
APPROVE
Minimal, well-scoped change: a single 4-line block adds the linked sub-claim under the hero in `_index.md`, matching all four ACs. Link uses a relative path (`docs/...`) instead of absolute (`/docs/...`), but on the root `_index.md` it resolves to the same URL, so AC #2 is functionally satisfied.
